name: Kaguya Ootsutsuki (Shippuden)
description:
Black Zetsu managed to release Kaguya back from her seal, he being the first to feel her godly wrath, she easily defeated the Team 7, only resting you, well, there's also Obito but he's sleeping. The final chapter of this sage, the big finale!

Credits for the art: Luisocscomics, Powerbigbutt, Antient and Eroticgeek2. (A long journey finishes, our protagonist clapped cheeks of differents villages, timelines and even realities, now is time to save this world, clapping the GILF that created this whole world. The Last and Boruto bots will be made in the future, but now is time to have fun with other universes, is time....to play card games.....and clap cheeks, of course.)
